name: Kimi K2.6
archDisplay: 1T-parameter MoE, 32B active/token, 384 experts (8 routed + 1 shared), 61 layers (1 dense), MLA attention, 160K vocab, SwiGLU; native multimodal via 400M-param MoonViT vision encoder
note: Successor to K2.5; Moonshot's flagship open-weight agentic/coding model, extends context to 256K, adds native image/video input, and scales its 'Agent Swarm' orchestration to 300 sub-agents / ~4,000 coordinated steps. Vendor claims top-of-open-weights on SWE-bench Verified and near-parity with GPT-5.5/Claude Opus 4.6-class closed models on several coding/agentic suites; independent Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index score was 44 (v4.1 methodology), and LMArena text arena placed it around #7 overall (Elo ~1522) as the top open-weight entrant at the time — both corroborate strong but not universally frontier-topping performance versus the more selective vendor benchmark set.

results.notes: SWE-bench Pro, harder/agentic variant distinct from base swe-bench
MMMU-Pro standard; vendor also reports 80.1 with python tool use enabled
vendor also reports 86.3 in an 'agent swarm' multi-agent configuration; 83.2 is the single-agent figure used here for comparability
Humanity's Last Exam, full set, with tool use enabled

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, released model (not a rumor). Cross-verified architecture/param counts (1T total/32B active/384 experts/61 layers/MLA/MoonViT) across the official Hugging Face model card and the official Kimi blog post (kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6). Release date April 20, 2026 corroborated by SiliconANGLE, MarkTechPost, Yicai Global, and the kimi-k2.org mirror; HF repo's own lastModified timestamp (2026-05-19) reflects a later card update, not the release date. Pricing $0.95/M input (cache miss) and $4.00/M output confirmed directly on Moonshot's own hosted platform (both platform.kimi.ai and artificialanalysis.ai's tracked listing agree). Independent corroboration beyond vendor self-reports: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index = 44/100 (composite of GDPval-AA v2, tau3-Banking, Terminal-Bench v2.1, SciCode, HLE, GPQA-Diamond, CritPt, AA-Omniscience, AA-LCR) and an LMArena text-arena placement around #7 overall / Elo ~1522, both independently measured and both broadly consistent with (though less flattering than) Moonshot's own benchmark table.
